dashboard.name: Dashboard Layout
dashboard.description: Multi-section dashboard with sidebar navigation and main content area for data visualization and overview cards.

breakpoints.sm: Single column; sidebar collapses to a top hamburger menu.
breakpoints.md: Sidebar hidden by default, toggled via a drawer.
breakpoints.lg: Full two-column layout with persistent sidebar.

header.description: Top navigation bar with branding and user profile

responsive.sm: Full-width bar; collapse nav links into a hamburger Button.
responsive.md: Show primary nav links; hide secondary actions.
responsive.lg: Full header with all nav links and user profile visible.

sidebar.description: Left sidebar with navigation menu and filters

responsive.sm: Hidden; replaced by bottom tab bar or drawer (see mobile-tabs pattern).
responsive.md: Icon-only collapsed sidebar (w-16); expand on hover.

main.description: Central content area with data cards and visualizations

responsive.sm: Single column stack; DataTable switches to card-per-row view.
responsive.lg: Three or four-column card grid with full DataTable.

footer.description: Bottom footer with pagination or additional controls

responsive.sm: Pagination controls stack vertically; hide secondary links.
responsive.md: Inline pagination with page size selector.
responsive.lg: Full footer with pagination and metadata.

auth.name: Authentication Layout
auth.description: Centered single-column card layout for login, registration, or other authentication flows.

breakpoints.sm: Full-screen card; no card border — form fields fill the viewport with padding.
breakpoints.md: Centered card (max-w-sm) with shadow on a neutral background.
breakpoints.lg: Same as md; optionally show a branded illustration panel to the left.

logo.description: Logo or branding area at the top

responsive.lg: Logo in sidebar panel or centered above card.

main.description: Central card containing form fields and submission controls

responsive.sm: No card wrapper; fields span full width with px-4.

footer.description: Bottom links for password recovery, sign up, or terms

form.name: Form Layout
form.description: Two-column form layout with labeled fields and a separate action bar for submit and cancel buttons.

breakpoints.sm: Single-column; each field spans full width.
breakpoints.md: Two-column grid for short fields (name, email); long fields (textarea) remain full-width.
breakpoints.lg: Two-column grid with wider max-width container.

responsive.md: Title (text-2xl) with description beside or below.

main.description: Form fields arranged in a responsive grid with labels

responsive.md: grid-cols-2; pair related short fields side by side.

actions.description: Action buttons aligned to the left or right

responsive.sm: Buttons stack vertically, full-width (primary on top).

settings.name: Settings Layout
settings.description: Sidebar navigation with settings categories and corresponding content panel for managing preferences.

breakpoints.sm: Sidebar becomes a full-width scrollable tab strip above the content panel.
breakpoints.md: Sidebar is a compact list (w-40) to the left of the content panel.
breakpoints.lg: Full sidebar (w-48) with icon + label navigation items.

sidebar.description: Left sidebar with settings category navigation

responsive.sm: Horizontal scrollable tab row at the top (overflow-x-auto).
responsive.md: Vertical list (w-40), icon + short label per item.
responsive.lg: Vertical list (w-48), icon + full label, active state highlighted.

main.description: Main panel showing the selected settings category content

responsive.sm: Full-width below the tab strip; fields single-column.
responsive.md: Flex-1 panel beside sidebar; fields single-column.
responsive.lg: Same as md; can use 2-column grid for dense field sets.

mobile-list.name: Mobile List Layout
mobile-list.description: Mobile-first scrollable list with a sticky header, a floating action button, and a pull-to-refresh zone. Optimized for touch targets and thumb-reachable actions.

breakpoints.sm: Primary layout — full-screen scrollable list with bottom FAB.
breakpoints.md: Center the list in a max-w-lg container; FAB stays bottom-right.
breakpoints.lg: Promote to a master-detail split: list on left, detail panel on right.

header.description: Sticky top bar with title and optional search/filter

responsive.sm: Full-width sticky header (h-14); search Input collapses to icon button.
responsive.lg: Integrated into the master-pane header of the split layout.

list.description: Scrollable item rows with swipe-to-action support

responsive.sm: Full-width Card rows; min-height 56px per row for touch.
responsive.lg: Left panel of a master-detail split.

fab.description: Floating action button for the primary create/add action

responsive.md: Same position, within the max-w-lg container.
responsive.lg: Replace with a standard Button in the detail panel header.

mobile-tabs.name: Mobile Tab Navigation Layout
mobile-tabs.description: Mobile-first layout with a persistent bottom tab bar for primary navigation and a content area per tab. Mirrors native app navigation patterns.

breakpoints.sm: Bottom tab bar (5 tabs max); content fills the area above.
breakpoints.md: Transition tab bar to a left sidebar; content expands.
breakpoints.lg: Full sidebar layout (see dashboard or settings pattern).

header.description: Per-screen top bar with title and optional contextual actions

responsive.sm: Minimal bar (h-14) with screen title and 1–2 icon Buttons.
responsive.md: Taller header with text labels on action Buttons.
responsive.lg: Merged into the sidebar layout header.

content.description: Active tab content area — scrolls independently of the tab bar

responsive.sm: Full-width, flex-1, overflow-y-auto above the tab bar.
responsive.md: Content area beside a left nav; tab bar hidden.
responsive.lg: Same as md with wider content container.

tabBar.description: Persistent bottom navigation with icon + label per primary section

responsive.sm: Fixed bottom bar (h-16, safe-area-inset-bottom); 3–5 Button tabs.
responsive.md: Hidden; replaced by left sidebar navigation.
responsive.lg: Hidden; replaced by left sidebar navigation.
